'''âp-b-k-w''' ('''kapabkewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tumbleset|tumbleset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tumbleset|tumbleset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-b-k-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapabkewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabkewoko|thipabkewoko]] || [[word:jipabkewoko|jipabkewoko]] || [[word:shipabkewoko|shipabkewoko]] || [[word:kipabkewoko|kipabkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabkewoko|thuthupabkewoko]] || [[word:jujupabkewoko|jujupabkewoko]] || [[word:shushupabkewoko|shushupabkewoko]] || [[word:kukupabkewoko|kukupabkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabkewoko|thupabkewoko]] || [[word:jupabkewoko|jupabkewoko]] || [[word:shupabkewoko|shupabkewoko]] || [[word:kupabkewoko|kupabkewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabkewoko|thupabkewoko]] || [[word:jupabkewoko|jupabkewoko]] || [[word:shupabkewoko|shupabkewoko]] || [[word:kupabkewoko|kupabkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabkewoko|thepabkewoko]] || [[word:jepabkewoko|jepabkewoko]] || [[word:shepabkewoko|shepabkewoko]] || [[word:kepabkewoko|kepabkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabkewoko|thothopabkewoko]] || [[word:jojopabkewoko|jojopabkewoko]] || [[word:shoshopabkewoko|shoshopabkewoko]] || [[word:kokopabkewoko|kokopabkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabkewoko|thopabkewoko]] || [[word:jopabkewoko|jopabkewoko]] || [[word:shopabkewoko|shopabkewoko]] || [[word:kopabkewoko|kopabkewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabkewoko|thopabkewoko]] || [[word:jopabkewoko|jopabkewoko]] || [[word:shopabkewoko|shopabkewoko]] || [[word:kopabkewoko|kopabkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpabkewoko|thĂŠpabkewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpabkewoko|jĂŠpabkewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpabkewoko|shĂŠpabkewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpabkewoko|kĂŠpabkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabkewoko|thathapabkewoko]] || [[word:jajapabkewoko|jajapabkewoko]] || [[word:shashapabkewoko|shashapabkewoko]] || [[word:kakapabkewoko|kakapabkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabkewoko|thapabkewoko]] || [[word:japabkewoko|japabkewoko]] || [[word:shapabkewoko|shapabkewoko]] || [[word:kapabkewoko|kapabkewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabkewoko|thapabkewoko]] || [[word:japabkewoko|japabkewoko]] || [[word:shapabkewoko|shapabkewoko]] || [[word:kapabkewoko|kapabkewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapabkewithi|shapabkewithi]] || [[word:shapabkewiji|shapabkewiji]] || [[word:shapabkewishi|shapabkewishi]] || [[word:shapabkewiki|shapabkewiki]]

|-
